provisions.description: Sets maximum annual payable rate for Capitol Police members and civilian employees with FLSA overtime at Executive Schedule II ($199,300) for calendar year 2021. Excludes retention bonuses and hazard bonuses related to the events of January 6th from the limitation.

provisions.description: Prohibits use of funds in this or any other Act, past, present, or future, to install permanent above-ground fencing around the perimeter or any portion thereof of the United States Capitol Grounds.

provisions.description: Extends and modifies the Afghan Special Immigrant Visa program: expands employment eligibility to include ISAF employees; modifies appeal processes; increases visa cap from 26,500 to 34,500; extends application deadlines from December 31, 2022 to December 31, 2023; extends reporting deadline from January 31, 2023 to January 31, 2024; adds Chief of Mission approval to processing timeline.

provisions.description: Requires the Secretary of State, in consultation with the Secretary of Defense, to submit a report (with classified annex if necessary) on the Afghan SIV program, including total visas issued by fiscal year, types of roles performed, average processing times, pending applications, and estimated eligible population.
deadlines: Not later than 1 year after enactment

provisions.description: Authorizes the Secretary of State and Secretary of Homeland Security to jointly issue a blanket waiver of the medical examination requirement for Afghan SIV applicants prior to visa issuance or admission, for renewable 1-year periods. Requires medical exam within 30 days of admission with conditional permanent resident status until exam completed. Includes reporting requirement on exam status. Sunset 3 years after enactment.

provisions.description: Provides special immigrant status eligibility to surviving spouses and children of U.S. government employees abroad who served at least 15 years or were killed in the line of duty. Amends the INA, Afghan Allies Protection Act, and Refugee Crisis in Iraq Act to extend SIV eligibility to surviving family members. Effective retroactively to June 30, 2021.
provisions.policy_area: Immigration — Special immigrant visas for surviving family members
